prose:
**Phenol Fukui reactivity — computed result**

**Method/provenance.** Property: condensed Fukui reactivity indices from Mulliken partial charges. Level of theory: DFT tier `standard`, explicitly `b3lyp/def2-tzvp` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP). Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ geometry at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz`; no geometry optimization/relaxation was reported by this Fukui run. Environment: gas phase (`solvent: null`). Parent state: charge 0, multiplicity 1. N−1 cation state: charge +1, multiplicity 2. N+1 anion state: charge −1, multiplicity 2. Backend reported by chemkit: `program: dft`; Mulliken charges from PySCF were reported, but no PySCF version was returned. Density fitting was **not** requested; the `--density-fit` flag was not used.

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = atom **3** (1-based label), **C**, with **f+ = 2.1028319**.  
Most nucleophilic site = atom **1** (1-based label), **O**, with **f− = 0.16201477**.

Per-atom condensed Fukui indices, in the input atom order:

| atom label | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | -0.99513676 | 0.16201477 | -0.416561 | -1.1571515 |
| 2 | C | 0.39933187 | 0.048772551 | 0.22405221 | 0.35055932 |
| 3 | C | 2.1028319 | 0.070972379 | 1.0869022 | 2.0318595 |
| 4 | C | 1.6196805 | 0.070498539 | 0.84508954 | 1.549182 |
| 5 | C | -0.34200646 | 0.026704972 | -0.15765074 | -0.36871143 |
| 6 | C | -0.28910825 | 0.020949414 | -0.13407942 | -0.31005767 |
| 7 | C | 1.3079753 | 0.12351549 | 0.7157454 | 1.1844598 |
| 8 | H | -0.73391777 | 0.082321145 | -0.32579831 | -0.81623892 |
| 9 | H | -0.27465614 | 0.088147788 | -0.093254178 | -0.36280393 |
| 10 | H | -0.91706058 | 0.081105985 | -0.4179773 | -0.99816657 |
| 11 | H | -0.62991625 | 0.080487046 | -0.2747146 | -0.7104033 |
| 12 | H | -0.29591676 | 0.09349577 | -0.10121049 | -0.38941253 |
| 13 | H | 0.047899332 | 0.051014152 | 0.049456742 | -0.0031148196 |

**Warnings:** no `warnings` array was returned by the tool result. The integrity verdict was `trustworthy: true`. Integrity checks returned by the engine were all `ok: true` and included these details verbatim: `sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`; `sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`; `common header present`.

**Reproducibility.** Chemkit CLI invocation reported by the engine: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout json /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp6854zf1h/live.json`. Plot file reported: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-152506_phenol_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. A live `.out` log path was required by the reporting standard, but this chemkit tool response did not include a `.out` path; I am not inventing one.
